title: volkameria lamiifolia
intro: Volkameria lamiifolia, also known as Indian mint or volkameria, is a perennial plant native to India and Southeast Asia. It is a member of the Lamiaceae family, which includes plants such as mint and basil. Volkameria lamiifolia has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which are said to aid in the treatment of various health issues. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is believed to have health benefits including relief from digestive issues and respiratory problems.
